post_study_work_visa.name: Not applicable (domestic market)
post_study_work_visa.restrictions: Most MBA graduates are Indian nationals. International students receive student visa with no post-study work extension.

language_requirement: English (primary language of instruction at all top programs)
scholarship_availability: High — merit-based scholarships at IIMs cover 50-100% of tuition. ISB offers significant need-based aid. Fee waivers for top CAT scorers.
path_to_pr: Not applicable for domestic students. International students typically do not pursue long-term stay.
test_policy: CAT (Common Admission Test) for IIMs. XAT for XLRI. GMAT accepted at ISB and some IIM programs. GRE gaining acceptance.
